particulars.description: The freehold property known as 42-50 carlisle street gateshead NE10 0HQ and land described as being land on the east side of carlisle street, gateshead and also land to the north of the british lion public house, carlisle street, felling, NE10 0HQ title numbers: TY456696, TY494938 & TY272465 + TY495501.
